prompt_text: You step into a shattered cathedral of battle. Bulldog Brutes, armored and growling, block your path in The Clawed Goblet. Their eyes burn with loyalty to the enemy horde.

pass.message: You outmatched the Bulldog Brutes and shattered their ranks. The path clears. +1 Max Health gained.

fail.message: You were overwhelmed by the brute force of the bulldogs. Your journey ends in the bloodied halls of The Clawed Goblet.
